data.title: TVS SCS and Italy’s ALA launch aerospace & defence supply chain JV in India
data.content:
TVS SCS and Italy’s ALA launch aerospace & defence supply chain JV in India. TVS Supply Chain Solutions and Italy’s ALA Group form a 51:49 aerospace & defence supply chain JV in India, investing €2m; operations expected by October.. Follow Us On Social Media

data.title: TVS Supply Chain forms JV with Italy's ALA Group to foray into aerospace and defence segment
data.content: TVS Supply Chain forms JV with Italy's ALA Group to foray into aerospace and defence segment. TVS Supply Chain Solutions is entering the aerospace and defence sector through a joint venture with Italy's ALA Group. This collaboration aims to provide integrated supply chain solutions for components, kitting, and logistics. The partnership is projected t…. data.title: TVS SCS, Italy’s ALA Group form aerospace and defence JV; target ₹2,000 crore revenue in 3-5 years
data.content: TVS SCS, Italy’s ALA Group form aerospace and defence JV; target ₹2,000 crore revenue in 3-5 years. The JV also marks TVS SCS’ entry into the high growth and globally significant aerospace and defence supply chain market, which is estimated at around $12 billion. TVS Supply Chain Solutions and Italys ALA Group have partnered to build an aerospace & defence supply chain platform in India.
